lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Welcome to the Grand Library Historical Archive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: This is the Library Historical Archive. Here you'll find historical documents and texts from all eras of Great Kourend's history, dating all the way back to the first decade.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Are you looking for something in particular?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What information do you have on Xeric?

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Ah, Xeric. Our most infamous ruler... We do have extensive records regarding Xeric. You can examine some of the texts here or speak to Ektheme, our Xerician expert.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Is there something else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about the Wintertodt?

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: The Wintertodt, or the Winter beast as it was often known at the time, terrorised northern Kourend for five decades.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Logios is currently studying the Wintertodt Invasion, and we have various texts from that era.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Is there something else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about Mount Quidamortem?

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Our first records of the mountain date back to the 36th decade where a Shayzien patrol discovered the mountain during a survey of the Kebos Lowlands.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: King Shayzien VII was keen on conquering more land for Kourend and demanded his people explore suitable territories.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: The mountain became known as Mount Quidamortem after it was realised venturing towards the summit resulted in certain death.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Gnosi is our expert on Mount Quidamortem, but I'm afraid she's currently on an expedition to the temple near the summit of the mountain. However, we do have some texts available detailing the great expedition.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Is there something else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: My name is Istoria. I'm the chief historian and curator of the Library Historical Archive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get out of here?

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: I can teleport you back to the Grand Library. Would you like to leave now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Welcome to the Grand Library Historical Archive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about King Shayzien VII.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Well you've come to the right place. What would you like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm searching for information on an expedition to Mount Quidamortem during his reign.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Ah yes, I know of that expedition. King Shayzien VII's reign was quite a violent one according to the history books. The expedition to Quidamortem was part of his aggressive plans to expand Kourend's territory.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Unfortunately, the expedition was a failure and the entire party was killed. The king himself died a few years later and was succeeded by the tyrant Xeric. No more expeditions were ordered under his rule.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Does that help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No not really. I have reason to believe that not everyone was killed on that expedition.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you there, all the evidence we have tells us that the expedition had no survivors.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I'm at a dead end?

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: It would seem that way. However, if you do want to learn more about King Shayzien VII it might be worth talking to Pagida. He's recently been investigating the kings' additions to the Tower of Magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: Welcome to the Grand Library Historical Archive.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know anything about Camorra? She was a hero who lived around two thousand years ago.

lines.speaker: Istoria
lines.text: I have heard that name, though we have very few records from before the founding of Kourend. Perhaps Imerominia could help you? She is the Horologist of the library; such ancient topics may fall within her purview.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.
